cards.immediateText: You can go ahead and dump 2 Swagger to scrape up that other bro so they drop as much clout as the printed value of their card.
cards.title: Throwing Hands

cards.duringText: Dump any amount of Swagger. This card's value is +2 for each Swagger dumped.
cards.title: The Bro of Bros

cards.duringText: This card's value is +1 for each Swagger that you got. (Don't dump your swagger for this strat, Bro.)
cards.title: Cool Story, Bro

cards.basicText: This card's strats just can't be shut down.
cards.duringText: You can dump 2 Swagger to make this card's value 5 instead. You can dump 1 Swagger to PUMP this card. (You can do both.)
cards.title: Cool Sword, Bro

cards.afterText: If you threw hands with a broski and totally owned them, you can go ahead and dump 3 Swagger to deck that broski.
cards.title: Get Out of My Way, Bro

cards.basicText: Choose an opponent. They trash 1 random card. Gain as much Swagger as that card can PUMP.
cards.title: The Grind

cards.basicText:
Dump any amount of Swagger. Choose a different strat for each Swagger dumped: 
- draw 2 cards 
- move Beowulf up to 4 spaces 
- Beowulf recovers 2 clout
cards.title: #blessed

cards.afterText: Wigy can go ahead and swap spaces with Beowulf.
cards.title: I’m Heated, Bro

cards.basicText: Wigy scrapes 1 clout off of each adjacent bro. If Beowulf was scraped up this way, gain 1 action.
cards.title: Spin to Win

cards.afterText: If you totally owned that other bro, draw 2 cards. If you got owned, your opponent draws 2 cards.
cards.title: Bro, that was Tight

cards.immediateText: Shut down all the strats on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Juked

cards.afterText: If you totally owned that other bro, choose one of the bros that threw hands and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Fight Me, Bro

hero.name: Beowulf
hero.specialAbility: Beowulf starts with 1 Swagger. When Beowulf gets scraped up, he gains 1 Swagger. Beowulf has a maximum of 3 Swagger.

name: Beowulf (The Bro Edition)
note:
Bro! Tell me we still know how to speak of kings!
Special thanks to DumbJoke and Nick76 for helping me come up with stuff and editing the art. And another huge thanks to tommy_elliot, sidious256 and BakedGoods for making the Beowulf book club podcast a blast! You can check out the podcast that inspired this reskin on Spotify under the name Defender Resolves First!
